channel.title: Coverage Changelog
channel.description: Free CMS coverage policy updates ranked by likely operational impact.

item.title: A58559: Billing and Coding: Independent Diagnostic Testing Facilities (IDTF)
item.description: High-signal revision from CMS notes: Under Article Text – Table: CPT/HCPCS Codes and CPT/HCPCS Codes Group 1: Codes added 70471. For 70471, under Article Text – Table: Supervising Physician Qualifications added Board Certified* Radiologist or Neurologist...

item.title: A54767: Billing and Coding: Medicare Preventive Coverage for Certain Vaccines
item.description: High-signal revision from CMS notes: Under CMS National Coverage Policy added the following regulation: CMS Internet-Only Manual, Pub. 100-02, Medicare Benefit Policy Manual , Chapter 15, §50.4.4.2 Immunizations. Under Article Text formatting changes wer...

item.title: A54799: Billing and Coding: Urine Drug Testing
item.description: High-signal revision from CMS notes: Under ICD-10-CM Codes that Support Medical Necessity Group 1: Codes added F11.120, F12.10, F12.20, F12.21, F13.10, F13.20, F13.21, F14.10, F14.120, F14.20, F14.21, F15.10, F15.20, F15.21, F19.10 and F19.21.

item.title: A57944: Billing and Coding: Hypoglossal Nerve Stimulation for Treatment of Obstructive Sleep Apnea
item.description: High-signal revision from CMS notes: Posted 05/07/2026 Under Coding Guidelines added reduced services modifier 52 information under Implantation codes. Under CPT/HCPCS Modifiers added 64582, 64583, and 64584 to Group 1 Paragraph . This is effective 01/01...

item.title: A55001: Billing and Coding: Urine Drug Testing
item.description: High-signal revision from CMS notes: Revision Effective Date: 06/01/2026 Under ICD-10-CM Codes That Support Medical Necessity: Added: F11.120, F12.10, F12.20, F12.21, F13.10, F13.20, F13.21, F14.10, F14.120, F14.20, F14.21, F15.10, F15.20, F15.21, F19.10...

item.title: A56915: Billing and Coding: Urine Drug Testing
item.description: High-signal revision from CMS notes: Posted 05/07/2026 Under ICD-10 Codes that Support Medical Necessity Group 1 Codes added F11.120, F12.10, F12.20, F12.21, F13.10, F13.20, F13,21, F14.10, F14.20, F14.21, F14.120, F15.10, F15.20, F15.21, F19.10, F19.21.

item.title: A59350: Billing and Coding: Radiation Therapies
item.description: High-signal revision from CMS notes: The effective date for revision 9 should be retroactive effective for dates of service on or after 1/1/26 not 4/1/26.

item.title: A53066: Self-Administered Drug Exclusion List:
item.description: High-signal revision from CMS notes: Under Excluded CPT/HCPCS Codes – Table Format added C9399, J3490, J3590 for Nemluvio (nemolizumab-ilto) and deleted the asterisk for Skyrizi™ (risankizumab-rzaa) using CPT codes C9399, J3490, J3590.

item.title: A59809: Billing and Coding: Botulinum Toxin Injections
item.description: High-signal revision from CMS notes: Posted 05/07/2026. Update to revision history posted 04/0/09/2026. Under the ICD-10-CM Codes that Support Medical Necessity section, the group for Paralytic ptosis was removed. Revision effective 04/09/2026.

item.title: 240.9: Noninvasive Positive Pressure Ventilation (NIPPV) in the Home for the Treatment of Chronic Respiratory Failure (CRF) Consequent to Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD)
item.description: Updated NCD coding via a new Change Request/Transmittal, no policy changes.

item.title: 220.6.17: Positron Emission Tomography (FDG) for Oncologic Conditions
item.description: Updated NCD coding via a new Change Request/Transmittal, no policy changes.

item.title: 160.18: Vagus Nerve Stimulation (VNS)
item.description: Updated NCD coding via a new Change Request/Transmittal, no policy changes.

item.title: 110.18: Aprepitant for Chemotherapy-Induced Emesis
item.description: Updated NCD coding via a new Change Request/Transmittal, no policy changes.

item.title: 90.2: Next Generation Sequencing (NGS)
item.description: Updated NCD coding via a new Change Request/Transmittal, no policy changes.

item.title: 150.13: Percutaneous Image-Guided Lumbar Decompression for Lumbar Spinal Stenosis
item.description: Updated NCD coding via a new Change Request/Transmittal, no policy changes.

item.title: 210.10: Screening for Sexually Transmitted Infections (STIs) and High-Intensity Behavioral Counseling (HIBC) to Prevent STIs
item.description: Updated NCD coding via a new Change Request/Transmittal, no policy changes.

item.title: A60185: Billing and Coding: Superficial Radiation Therapy (SRT) for the Treatment of Nonmelanoma Skin Cancers (NMSC)
item.description: Meaningful policy or coding update detected: Revision Effective: 03/01/2026 Revision Explanation: - Under Coding Guidance : “A qualified physician for this service is one that has training and expertise that must have been acquired within the framework of an acc...

item.title: L35249: Nerve Blocks for Peripheral Neuropathy
item.description: Meaningful policy or coding update detected: R14 Revision Effective: 05/07/2026 Revision Explanation: Annual review, no changes were made. 04/29/2026: At this time 21st Century Cures Act will apply to new and revised LCDs that restrict coverage which requires co...

item.title: L34195: Mohs Micrographic Surgery
item.description: Meaningful policy or coding update detected: R21 Revision Effective: 05/07/2026 Revision Explanation: Annual review, no changes. 04/29/2026: At this time 21st Century Cures Act will apply to new and revised LCDs that restrict coverage which requires comment and...

item.title: L39036: Epidural Steroid Injections for Pain Management
item.description: Lower-urgency correction or cleanup: Corrected link for #31 in the bibliography.

item.title: A58473: Billing and Coding: Non-Invasive Fractional Flow Reserve (FFR) for Ischemic Heart Disease
item.description: Lower-urgency correction or cleanup: Posted 04/30/2026: biennial review completed 04/30/2026 with no changes made to the article.

item.title: A57068: Billing and Coding: Ocular Photography - External
item.description: Lower-urgency correction or cleanup: Revision Effective: 05/07/2026 Revision Explanation: Annual review, no changes were made.

item.title: A57307: Billing and Coding: Nerve Conduction Studies and Electromyography
item.description: Lower-urgency correction or cleanup: Revision Effective: 05/07/2026 Revision Explanation: Annual review, no changes.

item.title: A57663: Billing and Coding: Nerve Blocks for Peripheral Neuropathy
item.description: Lower-urgency correction or cleanup: Revision Effective: 05/07/2026 Revision Explanation: Annual review, no changes.

item.title: A56836: Billing and Coding: Mohs Micrographic Surgery
item.description: Lower-urgency correction or cleanup: Revision Effective: 05/07/2026 Revision Explanation: Annual review, correction to typographical error.
